summary: p9-hardening delivered all 7 changes (7/7 MET). Stack is containerised, rate-limited, observable, security-audited, and staging-deployable. Two mechanical clippy corrections (match→if let in OTel init) were the only rework required. Zero test regressions. Recommended next phase: p10-production-launch (TLS, secrets management, alerting, cargo-audit in CI, k6 baseline, release tagging).
open_debt: k6 baselines are aspirational — run against live staging to get real P99s
STAGING_SMOKE_TOKEN is a long-lived JWT — rotate to short-lived bot identity
Grafana panel 4 (DB connections) requires sqlx Prometheus integration to produce data
`version: '3.9'` key in compose files is cosmetic noise — remove in cleanup sweep
